summary: Completed comprehensive testing of User Profile and Live Activity Board features. All 9 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified. New navigation links working correctly.

issues: Profile avatar shows text placeholder 'Profile Test User' instead of picture - minor styling preference
design_issues.note: Picture URL is provided but placeholder shows initials which is acceptable fallback

passed_tests: ✅ User profile includes all trust metrics (trust_score, ratings, badges, etc.)
✅ Trust score is dynamically calculated using correct formula
✅ Platform stats values are logically consistent (completed <= total)
✅ GET /api/auth/me returns user_id for profile routing
✅ User Profile page loads and displays trust score breakdown
✅ Live Activity page loads and displays platform statistics
✅ Back button on profile page works
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Profile and Live Activity features fully tested and working. Profile page at /profile shows own profile, /profile/:userId shows other users. Live Activity at /activity shows real-time platform stats with 30-second auto-refresh. Trust score formula: Transaction History (4pts/trade, max 40) + User Ratings (6pts/star, max 30) + Dispute Record (20 - 5*disputes, min 0) + Verification (10 if verified).

mocked_apis.note: Email sending is MOCKED via mock_send_email function

platform_stats_endpoint.returns: Platform-wide statistics (users, transactions, success rate, etc.)

features: Trust Score Breakdown with progress bars
